evidence_refs.ref: NVDA FY26Q1 10-Q (filed 2026-05-29) Note 14 segment disclosure, Compute & Networking
evidence_refs.verification_query: NVIDIA 10-Q FY26Q1 datacenter compute segment revenue Note 14

why_consensus_missed: The FY26Q1 10-Q broke out compute vs networking for the first time at this granularity; the implied compute exit-rate annualizes above the Street's FY27 datacenter line, which was set on the prior aggregated disclosure.
red_team_challenge: If the filed exit-rate reflects a one-time Blackwell pull-forward rather than a durable run-rate, the FY27 compute premium to consensus is a timing artifact, not a level reset.
